title: Cobble Contests
description: A side mod for cobblemon that tries to add contests from the main games
body:
Cobble Contests is a sidemod for cobblemon that aims to add contests from the games.

Use the poffin pot with berries and poffin dough to make poffins, and feed them to your pokemon to increase their contest stats. Poffins are based on the gen 4 mechanics and values. Unlike in the game, foul poffins will decrease stats and sheen. 

Pokemon can be entered into contests from the contest booth. Contests right now are very basic and just check stats. There are plans for more interactive and multiplayer contests in the furture.

Pokemon stats, moves, and ribbons can be checked from the contest card.
